---
title: "CV"
---

You can download my CV here:

[Download CV](files/SimengWu_CV2026.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Education

**Duke University**  
M.S. in Statistical Science

**University College London**  
B.Sc. in Statistics, Economics and Finance

## Selected Skills

**Programming:** Python, R, SQL, Stata, SAS  
**Statistical Methods:** Regression, Time Series, Bayesian Modeling, Machine Learning  
**Tools:** Quarto, Git, Docker, FastAPI, QuantConnect
